chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-6988 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE 1. For orders on CMA No.11111/2023. 2. For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.01.2023. Mr. Muhammad Khalid Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. -------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking correction in the record of the National Database & Registration Authority (“NADRA”), alleging that the two children said to have been born to her during subsistence of her first marriage have been wrongly shown as being the offspring of her second husband in the B-Form that has been issued. It is alleged that upon her approaching the NADRA for such correction of the Form, she was told that she should approach the competent Court of law, hence this Petition. Having considered the matter, we are of the view that a Petition is not the appropriate vehicle for determination of the matter and the Petitioner may approach the concerned Civil Court for redressal of her grievance through an appropriate proceeding. The Petition stands dismissed in such terms. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE MUBASHIR
